response.global_analysis:
1. Audio Match: The song 'Lucky 7th Whistle' by Tokino Sora matches the vocal audio perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference but corrected mistakes (e.g., 'やめる時も' to '病める時も' and '遠くだとか' to 'トークだとか') to accurately reflect the vocal and thematic context.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely synced with vocal starts and ends. Subtitles cease during the instrumental transitions and end right before the transition to the live concert hall as the song fades out. Fixed a duplicate timestamp error in the 'Six, please listen to my request?' subtitle block.

subtitles.original: 終わらないで
subtitles.english: Please don't let it end...

subtitles.original: ここに宣言します！セブンスホイッスル
subtitles.english: Here, I declare! 7th Whistle!

subtitles.original: ひとつ、病める時も 健やかなる時もずっと
subtitles.english: One, through times of sickness or health, I'll always...

subtitles.original: 愛を歌い続けることを堂々と誓います
subtitles.english: ...proudly swear to keep singing of love!

subtitles.original: ふたつ、トークだとかダンスももっと追求します
subtitles.english: Two, I'll pursue MC-ing and dancing even more!

subtitles.original: みっつ、ずっと推してもらえるアイドルになってみせます
subtitles.english: Three, I'll show you I can become an idol who's always supported!

subtitles.original: よっつ、不安な未来も私が照らすんだ
subtitles.english: Four, I will shine upon the anxious future!

subtitles.original: それでも落ち込んじゃう日は
subtitles.english: Even on days when I feel down,

subtitles.original: 思い出しているよ みんなのその笑顔 その声
subtitles.english: I'll remember everyone's smiles and voices!

subtitles.original: ハッピーラッキーセブン革命！
subtitles.english: Happy Lucky Seven Revolution!

subtitles.original: サンデイ マンデイ この先ずっと一緒だよね 約束
subtitles.english: Sunday, Monday, from here on out forever, we'll be together, that's a promise!

subtitles.original: ほらね、笑う門には空来る
subtitles.english: See, where there is laughter, the sky comes!

subtitles.original: ハッピーバースデイ！毎日がほら チューズデイ ウェンズデイ ラッキーデイ
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday! Look, every day is Tuesday, Wednesday, Lucky day!

subtitles.original: 生まれ変わっても 迷わずに
subtitles.english: Even if I'm reborn, without hesitation,

subtitles.original: 君だけのアイドルになるよ
subtitles.english: I will become your one and only idol!

subtitles.original: 何度も見つけてね セブンスホイッスル
subtitles.english: Find me again and again! 7th Whistle!

subtitles.original: いつつ、アイドルとは時にあざとさも必要？
subtitles.english: Five, as an idol, is cuteness sometimes necessary?

subtitles.original: 誰かが言ってたけど うまくできないの、ねぇ！
subtitles.english: Someone said that, but I can't do it very well, right?

subtitles.original: むっつめは私から お願い聞いて？
subtitles.english: Six, please listen to my request?

subtitles.original: 推し変なんてしないでよね！私を見て！
subtitles.english: Don't change your fave! Look only at me!

subtitles.original: ハッピーラッキーセブン革命！
subtitles.english: Happy Lucky Seven Revolution!
